question.label: Next-step landing
question.name: Given what we've covered, what should we tighten up before our next check-in?
question.description: Closes on concrete follow-up and keeps the meeting moving toward action.

answer: I will ask one architecture question in the next incident review instead of keeping it in my notes doc.

assessment.note: He named a specific next behavior change—asking an architecture question in the incident review—which signals slightly improved clarity and learning orientation.

history.answer_excerpt: The runbook helped, but some practical handoff details only show up during live incidents.
A short weekly architecture review with someone senior would help me calibrate faster.
I am comfortable reading the services, but I am less sure how decisions are really made here.

I have not been fully clear on who is on point for each domain when priorities conflict.
I am trying not to interrupt people, so sometimes I keep questions in a notes doc instead of asking.
